creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
More information about the background of the bug.

gpart create -t ntfs should create a ms-basic-data type partition, instead of throwing an "invalid argument" error that is obviously bogus when reading the manpage.

See this: https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/unable-to-create-an-ntfs-partition-in-a-new-gpt-table.86049/
